center.name: Cyclops Mountains
center.summary: Cyclops Mountains是图谱中的地点节点，当前关联2种鸟类，包括Fairy lorikeet、Josephine's lorikeet，主要用于表示这些物种的分布地、停歇地或观测地。

birds.label: 分布于
birds.evidence: rothschildi is found in north and central New Guinea in the Cyclops Mountains and other nearby mountain ranges.{{cite journal |url=http://www.hbw.com/species/fairy-lorikeet-charmosyna-pulchella |title=Fairy Lorikeet (Charmosyna pulchella) |author=Collar, N

birds.label: 分布于
birds.evidence: It is found in the highlands of New Guinea (central range and Cyclops Mountains)
